_doc: Configuração por canal. Cada canal define o mix visual e personagem fixo.

I.name: Fe al Descubierto
I.style: Hand-drawn Pencil Sketch Animation, Faith Unmasked white-headed stick-figure on cream beige paper, expressive eyebrows, selective color accent per character (mostarda/azul-poeira/verde-oliva/burgundy), parallel pencil hatching ground, no artist hand visible
I.notes: Spanish LatAm channel. Biblical truth/warning lists with double scriptural proof. Male authoritative-empathetic narrator (fixed voice I-male-es-01). Audience 50+ Latina women. Visual style locked: Faith Unmasked pencil sketch stick-figure (NOT photorealistic). Reference: Projetos/Meus Canais/Fe al Descubierto/Referencias/REFERENCIA DE IMAGENS/. Subtitles=false (typewriter overlay aplicado em pós). Music ~-11dB sob narração.

L.name: Finanzas Según la Biblia
L.style: Hand-drawn pencil/graphite sketch animation, monochromatic sepia and cream paper background with visible paper texture, parallel hatching shadows, stick figures with simple circular heads and minimalist faces, narrative cinematic biblical scenes with anchor objects (open Bible, cross, US dollar bills or Mexican pesos only, jar with growing plant, wheat field, clock, ancient Middle Eastern settings with camels/tents). NO saturated colors — only graphite, sepia, off-white, subtle pale gold on sacred objects. Slow Ken Burns animation, subtle elemental motion (steam, plants, stars), minimal character gestures, 6-10s per shot. Style anchor: Faith Unmasked pencil sketch + cinematic biblical illustration. Deliberately CONTRASTS with the colorful cartoon thumbnail style. Reference: Projetos/Meus Canais/Finanzas Según la Biblia/Referencias/REFERENCIA DE IMAGENS/
L.notes: Spanish neutral channel (LatAm + ES + US Latinos). Biblical finance reformed/Westminster posture, explicit anti-prosperity. 100% animated VIDEO (pencil sketch sepia style — see REFERENCIA DE IMAGENS). Thumbnail in CONTRASTING colorful cartoon style (see REFERENCIA THUMBNAIL). Inspired by viral 440K of @financasatravesdabiblia (BR) but corrects 3 YPP flags: (1) voz real ou TTS premium revisado, (2) 1 min opinião pessoal por EP, (3) personas hipotéticas declaradas. Currency RESTRICTION: USD or Mexican pesos only — never R$, EUR, ARS, etc. Status: em criação 2026-05-17, Fase 0. Docs: Projetos/Meus Canais/Finanzas Según la Biblia/.

J.name: El Pan Nuestro
J.style: Photorealistic cinematic biblical food devotional warm period-accurate
J.notes: Spanish channel. Comida + Biblia. Fixed narrator J-male-es-01 (Diego ElevenLabs clone). Inspired by @LostAmericanMemories listicle structure.

K.name: My Glitch Stick
K.style: Hand-drawn doodle illustration, irregular trembling black brush stroke outline, flat solid colors no gradient no shading, white or single solid color background, brown horizontal ground line, simple stick figures with round heads expressive eyebrows, amateur sketchy notebook style inspired by Zenn YouTube channel, 3 colors maximum per frame, red as accent only for negation/emphasis
K.notes: Spanish neutral LATAM channel. Curiosidades / experimentos mentales / lado oscuro / efectos psicológicos. Long-form 8-12min. Fixed narrator K-male-es-01 (Joao clone). Voice tone: amigo no bar, conversacional, energia média-alta. Inspired by Zenn @Zenn0009 in STYLE only — see Voz-do-Canal.md in Obsidian for anti-copy rules.
